ab: imazi i akav a nia umaq.
man lima a pipenuljatan a nia kinacemekeljan.
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: a nia kinacemekeljan matjelu amen a marekakakaka.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: a ku kinacemekeljan izua it kama, ti kina, tia kaka katua tiaken.
ch: 我的家庭有爸爸、媽媽、哥哥、姊姊還有我。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: kisacu a ku kama, saka qacaqaca aravac a kinalingdjeljan.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: sirupucemel a ku kina, saka kuljakuljay aravac a kinacavacavan.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and she is a doctor.

ab: nu i tjumaq ti kama kemacalisianan tjanuamen.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the paiwan language with us at home.

ab: nu kalja pulavayan tua kaljazulezulan vayk amen a pasa qinaljan.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: maciur amen katia kaka a kikiav.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brother and sister and I will catch frogs together.

ab: tjengelay aken aravac tua nia kinacemekeljan.
en: I like our family very much.
